name: restaurant owners processing 10–20 payrolls/month tool
description: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 payrolls/month, manual timesheet entry causes payroll delays. We automate payroll instead of manual payroll processing.
problem_solved: Manual timesheet entry leads to payroll delays.
